title: Incredibly Crispy Dutch Salt Cod Fritters
description: A nostalgic Dutch dish featuring salt cod, score fat, and low carb friendly ingredients, these fritters are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside with a nutty flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flaked salt cod, melted score fat, almond flour, eggs, chopped onion, parsley, garlic powder, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully place a few of the patties in the hot oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a squeeze of lemon juice and your favorite dipping sauce.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining patties.
Keep the fritters warm in a low oven while frying the remaining batches.
